_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Confirmatory immunohistochemical staining showed a significant decrease in the staining of murine macrophage marker F4/80 in DKO DRG
details: Successfully demonstrated significant decrease in macrophage staining in DKO DRG compared to Nf2 DRG
